info.title: CNAP API
info.description:
Public API for managing CNAP workspaces, clusters, templates, products, and deployments.

Authenticate with a Personal Access Token via the `Authorization: Bearer cnap_pat_...` header.

Workspace-scoped endpoints require the `X-Workspace-Id` header.

BearerAuth.description: Personal Access Token (cnap_pat_...) or OAuth2 JWT. Create tokens at https://cnap.tech/account/tokens

cursor.description: Cursor for next page, null if no more

param.description: The request field that caused the error

suggestion.example: Run `cnap clusters list` to see available clusters

token.description: The full token. This is shown only once — store it securely.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the KaaS cluster

registry_proxy_mode.description: OCI registry proxy mode for image pulls

helm_sources.description: Helm chart sources for this template

repo_url.description: Helm repository URL or Git repository URL

path.description: Path within a Git repository to the chart

show_sources.description: Show helm sources on marketplace page

code.description: Async JavaScript function body executed in a sandboxed V8 isolate. Has access to cnap.request() for API calls.

display_type.description: Controls how the snippet result is rendered in dashboard widgets

created_by.description: User ID of the snippet creator

widgets.description: Ordered list of widgets in the dashboard grid

created_by.description: User ID of the dashboard creator

snippet_id.description: ID of the snippet this widget runs

display_type.description: Override the snippet default display type for this widget

get.description: Returns metadata for all tokens. Full token values are never shown after creation.

post.description: Creates a new PAT. The full token is returned in the response and never shown again.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the token expires. Omit for no expiry.

201.description: Token created. The `token` field is shown only once.

get.description: Lists all workspaces the authenticated user belongs to. No X-Workspace-Id needed.

403.description: Not a member of this workspace

get.description: Lists all clusters in the workspace specified by the X-Workspace-Id header.
Returns detailed information about a cluster, including KaaS status if applicable.

403.description: Not a member of the cluster workspace

patch.description: Update cluster name or region. The region must be in the same workspace.

403.description: Not a member of the cluster workspace

delete.description: Deletes a cluster and its configuration. KaaS-managed clusters are deprovisioned. Fails if the cluster has active installations.

403.description: Not a member of the cluster workspace

get.description:
Returns the admin kubeconfig for a KaaS-managed cluster. The cluster must be in RUNNING status.

Supports content negotiation via the `Accept` header:
- `application/json` — returns JSON (default for API clients)
- `application/yaml` — returns YAML (default for kubectl/CLI)

400.description: Cluster is not in RUNNING status

403.description: Not a member of the cluster workspace

404.description: Cluster not found or not KaaS-managed

get.description: Returns all templates belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Creates a template with helm sources. Templates define the Kubernetes resources that products deploy.

get.description: Returns template with its helm sources.

patch.description: Partially updates a template. Only provided fields are changed. Updating sources triggers async chart regeneration.

delete.description: Fails if referenced by products or installs.

409.description: Template is referenced by products or installs

get.description: Returns all products belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Creates a product with helm sources and cluster associations. Triggers async chart generation.

get.description: Returns product metadata including template reference and marketplace settings.

patch.description: Replaces product configuration including helm sources, clusters, and settings. Triggers async chart regeneration.

delete.description: Fails if the product has active installs.

get.description: Returns all installs belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Deploys a product to a region. Pass an `Idempotency-Key` header to safely retry on timeout.

schema.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations. If the same key is sent again, the existing workflow is returned instead of creating a new one.

parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations. If the same key is sent again, the existing workflow is returned instead of creating a new one.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

overrides.description: Initial value overrides per helm source

get.description: Returns install metadata including its product, template, and cluster references.

delete.description: Triggers async deletion of the install and its resources.

get.description: Returns pods and their containers for the install.

post.description: Deploys custom helm sources directly to clusters without a product. Pass an `Idempotency-Key` header to safely retry on timeout.

schema.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations. If the same key is sent again, the existing workflow is returned instead of creating a new one.

parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations. If the same key is sent again, the existing workflow is returned instead of creating a new one.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

patch.description: Updates template helm source values and regenerates the chart. Use this for standalone installs or to change the base values of a product install.
Applies per-install value overrides on top of the product base values. Does not regenerate the chart.

get.description: Streams logs from the install pods via Server-Sent Events. Use the `Accept: text/event-stream` header.

schema.description: Only return logs newer than this many seconds

parameters.description: Only return logs newer than this many seconds
parameters.name: since_seconds

get.description: Returns all regions belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Creates a named region in the workspace. Regions group clusters geographically for marketplace display.

get.description: Returns credentials for the workspace. Credential secrets are never exposed.

post.description: Adds a registry credential to the workspace for OCI proxy authentication.

delete.description: Permanently removes a registry credential. Active installs using this credential may lose pull access.

get.description:
Transparent proxy to the cluster's Kubernetes API server. The path after `/kube/` is forwarded directly. All HTTP methods are supported.

**Examples:**
- `GET /clusters/{id}/kube/api/v1/namespaces` — list namespaces
- `GET /clusters/{id}/kube/api/v1/namespaces/{ns}/pods` — list pods
- `GET /clusters/{id}/kube/api/v1/namespaces/{ns}/pods/{pod}/log?tailLines=100` — pod logs
- `GET /clusters/{id}/kube/apis/apps/v1/namespaces/{ns}/deployments` — list deployments
- `GET /clusters/{id}/kube/openapi/v3` — Kubernetes OpenAPI spec

502.description: Failed to proxy to Kubernetes API

post.description: Runs a command in a pod container and returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. Non-interactive (no TTY, no stdin). Timeout: 30 seconds.

400.description: Cluster not running or invalid request

get.description: Returns all snippets belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Creates a reusable code snippet in the workspace. Snippets are async JavaScript functions executed in a sandboxed V8 isolate with access to cnap.request() for API calls.

code.description: Async JavaScript function body. Executed in a sandboxed V8 isolate with access to cnap.request().

display_type.description: Controls how the snippet result is rendered in dashboard widgets

get.description: Returns a snippet including its code and display type.

patch.description: Updates snippet properties. Only provided fields are changed. Dashboards using this snippet will pick up code changes on next run.

display_type.description: Controls how the snippet result is rendered in dashboard widgets

delete.description: Permanently deletes a snippet. Fails with 409 if the snippet is referenced by any dashboard widgets.

get.description: Returns all dashboards belonging to the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-Id header.

post.description: Creates a dashboard with an optional initial widget layout. Each widget references a snippet by ID and can override its display type.

display_type.description: Controls how the snippet result is rendered in dashboard widgets

get.description: Returns a dashboard including its widget layout and snippet references.

patch.description: Update dashboard metadata and/or widget layout.

display_type.description: Controls how the snippet result is rendered in dashboard widgets

delete.description: Permanently deletes a dashboard. Referenced snippets are not affected.
